title: Crispy Sweet Italian White Yam Fritters
description: A kid‑friendly, egg‑free Italian‑inspired fritter made from grated white yam, sweetened with honey and baked to a golden crisp, perfect for a playful snack.
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, grate the white yams and squeeze out excess moisture with a paper towel.
Add orange zest, honey, gluten‑free flour, baking powder, salt, pepper, and basil to the yam mixture; stir until a sticky batter forms.
Drop spoonfuls (about 2 tablespoons each) onto the prepared sheet, spacing them 2 inches apart.
Lightly drizzle or brush the tops with olive oil, then bake for 18–20 minutes, flipping halfway through, until golden and crisp.
While the fritters finish baking, warm the honey in a small saucepan until slightly runny for a drizzle.
When ready, arrange the fritters on a plate, drizzle with warm honey, and sprinkle a pinch of sea salt.
Serve immediately, optionally with a squeeze of lemon or a light tomato salad.
